name_en: The Bow Clasp (Butterfly Knot) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric, paired with chestnut leather, exudes a vintage vibe. A refreshing change from the all-leather version, it has a unique charm.
name_cn:
The Bow Clasp (Butterfly Knot) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric, paired with chestnut leather, exudes a vintage vibe. A refreshing change from the all-leather version, it has a unique charm.
Style: 786194
Size: 45*22*34cm
